# react-any-carousel

> A lightweight, zero-dependency React carousel component. Supports auto-scroll, snap, touch/swipe, custom easing, custom icons, and any content type (images, videos, custom components).

## Installation

```bash
npm install react-any-carousel
```

## Quick Start

```tsx
import { Carousel } from "react-any-carousel";

<Carousel scrollSnapType="center" scrollOffset={300}>
  <div>Item 1</div>
  <div>Item 2</div>
  <div>Item 3</div>
</Carousel>
```

## Props

- `children` (ReactNode, required): Content to display.
- `theme` ("light" | "dark", default "light"): Theme for nav icons.
- `scrollSnapType` ("start" | "center" | "end" | "none", default "start"): Scroll snap alignment.
- `scrollOffset` (number, default 1000): Pixels to scroll per click.
- `autoSlideInterval` (number): Auto-scroll interval in ms.
- `duration` (number, default 600): Scroll animation duration in ms.
- `scrollEasing` (string): CSS cubic-bezier() for scroll animation.
- `iconOptions` ({ icon?: ReactNode, iconStyles?: CSSProperties }): Custom nav icons.

## Examples

Image gallery:
```tsx
<Carousel scrollSnapType="center" scrollOffset={400}>
  <img src="/photo-1.jpg" alt="Photo 1" style={{ width: 400 }} />
  <img src="/photo-2.jpg" alt="Photo 2" style={{ width: 400 }} />
</Carousel>
```

Auto-play:
```tsx
<Carousel autoSlideInterval={3000}>
  <div>Slide 1</div>
  <div>Slide 2</div>
</Carousel>
```

Custom icons:
```tsx
<Carousel iconOptions={{ icon: <MyIcon />, iconStyles: { color: "red" } }}>
  <div>Item 1</div>
</Carousel>
```

Dark mode:
```tsx
<Carousel theme="dark" scrollSnapType="center" scrollOffset={300}>
  <div>Dark 1</div>
  <div>Dark 2</div>
</Carousel>
```

## Docs

- README: https://github.com/MayurSMahajan/AnyCarousel/blob/main/packages/react-any-carousal/README.md
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-any-carousel
